title: 高松宮記念の後に・伝え合う熱！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I did it! I went full throttle at a G1! My running just now was filled with red-hot passion!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But this is far from my peak! I know I can hit even
higher heights!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: My dream is much, much hotter than this!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Racer A
text_block_list.text:
Incredible... Bamboo Memory seems to have even
more energy than before the race.

text_block_list.name: Defeated Racer A
text_block_list.text:
I can't give up. I've got to keep moving forward,
just like her!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Racer B
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I'm gonna give it my all in my next race,
the same way Bamboo Memory did!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa... I wasn't expecting the race to get so
heated without Oguri. So that's Bamboo Memory,
huh... I'll have to keep an eye on her.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She's the real deal when it comes to sprints! This
year's Sprinters Stakes is gonna be wild! I just
know it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
That free-spirited way she runs has got me
hooked! I can't wait to see her next race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not only has she lit a fire under her competitors
on the turf, but she also set the hearts of the
audience ablaze.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And it seems... that same flame has taken root in
my heart as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: So this is the real you, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: After today's race, my confidence has tripled!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go even higher, though! In fact, I wanna
claim the very summit of sprints!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After knocking down one wall with a stunning
performance, Bamboo Memory is overflowing
with energy. It's hard to believe she just finished a
whole race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Please excuse the interruption.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to offer my congratulations, Bamboo.
That was a spectacular race.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ardan! Thanks so much for coming today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, I should be thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There are some things we can only convey
through running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Through your performance today, I was able to
witness your dream, your desire, and your
determination firsthand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The pure and earnest light you shine with has
inspired me to work toward my own dream once
more.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for interrupting your celebration. I
simply wanted to thank you directly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'll be cheering for you and your dream, Bamboo.
Now, if you'll excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
choice_data_list:
Looks like your dream came through loud and
clear.

Looks like your dream came through loud and
clear.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! She's totally feeling the heat! That just
means I've gotta start burning even brighter!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So what race should I do next, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Let's try out a G1 mile race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: A mile race! Does that mean...
choice_data_list: It sure does! We're taking on the Yasuda Kinen!
It sure does! We're taking on the Yasuda Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! That's where they decide the Ruler of the
Mile in the first half of the year! Yeah, what a
choice!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna do even better at the Yasuda
Kinen than I did today! And then...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Honor and glory will be MINE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Bamboo Memory's truly commendable job
at today's race, we set our sights on our next
goal—the Yasuda Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after the Takamatsunomiya Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There we go! The seats look clean to me! I guess
that's everything for toda—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What the?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Chiyono O! That's right! She's set the date
she's returning to racing, so she must be back to
training full out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to watch her run again! And she'll be
right there next to Ardan and Yaeno and...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Good luck, Chiyono O! I'm counting down the
days until I see you race again!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...I don't want to get in her way. I think I'll head
over to the gym!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I knew it... I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's whisper is as soft as it is
bitter. But those words don't reach Bamboo
Memory's ears as she strides confidently toward
the Yasuda Kinen.
